name: BingX Cryptocurrency Exchange API
what_it_does: Cryptocurrency exchange REST and WebSocket API with social trading features — enabling traders to access spot, perpetual futures, and standard futures markets across 300+ pairs, leverage copy trading by following expert traders, and build algorithmic trading strategies, with HMAC-SHA256 authentication and comprehensive market data.
use_cases: Executing perpetual futures trades via BingX REST API for algorithmic leveraged strategies
Accessing copy trading portfolios via BingX API to automate following expert traders
Streaming real-time market data via BingX WebSocket for trading bots and analytics
Managing spot trading positions via BingX API for automated spot strategies
Building social trading applications via BingX API for copy trading platform integration
not_for: US users (BingX does not serve US customers)
Complex options trading (BingX focuses on spot and perpetual futures)
best_when: A non-US retail trader wants social/copy trading features alongside algorithmic API access, or a developer building copy trading automation tools.
avoid_when: You're in the US, need institutional services, wide altcoin selection, or options trading.

auth.notes: API Key + API Secret for HMAC-SHA256 signing. signature query parameter. timestamp query parameter (Unix milliseconds). Signature: HMAC-SHA256 of sorted parameter string. API key as apiKey parameter. No OAuth2. WebSocket: authenticate via listen key. recvWindow parameter for timestamp tolerance (default 5000ms).

pricing.free_tier_limits: API access free; spot maker 0.10% / taker 0.10%; futures 0.02% maker / 0.05% taker
pricing.notes: Singapore incorporated. Founded 2018. $100M+ revenue. Copy trading: follow expert traders with profit sharing. 300+ trading pairs. Perpetuals: up to 150x leverage. Standard futures. Social trading: leaderboard, trader portfolios. BingX Token (BX) for fee discounts. US not served. Strong presence in Southeast Asia and Latin America. Forex CFD features (for licensed jurisdictions). API documentation via GitHub Pages. WebSocket via listen key pattern (similar to Binance).

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: HMAC-SHA256. signature + timestamp in query params. US not served. Singapore. Copy trading differentiator. 300 req/sec. Listen key for WebSocket. recvWindow tolerance.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Order reads idempotent by order ID. clientOrderId for client deduplication. Cancel idempotent by order ID. timestamp window (recvWindow) prevents replay.
known_agent_gotchas: Signature in query string (not header): append ?timestamp={ts}&signature={sig} to all private requests
recvWindow default 5000ms — requests older than this are rejected (sync server time)
US users not served — verify jurisdiction compliance
Listen key for WebSocket private channel: POST /openApi/user/auth/userDataStream
Listen key expires after 60 minutes: extend with PUT request
Copy trading API requires separate endpoint group vs standard trading endpoints

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. HMAC-SHA256 signing. Timestamp-based replay protection. Singapore regulation. US not served. Cryptocurrency financial data — high value target. Signature in query string (less secure than header — avoid logging URLs). Listen key for WebSocket (temporary). No OAuth2.
